Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14219 0 0}Hmmm? Need something to wipe off your glasses?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}Well, yes, I do have something, but... you don't wear glasses.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's clearly for a friend! Get it? Heh heh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}Hang on, let me grab you one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14219 0 0}Hmmm? Need something to wipe off your glasses?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 4 -1 -1 0 0}I do have something, of course, but... you don't wear glasses.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, if you're looking for a wipe for eyeglasses, I have a spare.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14225 0 0}Here. It looks dingy, but it works very well, in fact.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, and here's a little something extra.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14221 0 0}It's the secret item I was thinking of using at the farewell party for the third-years...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}But it'd suit a cool kid like you better than an old-timer like me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}Now, I mustache you a question... How do you achieve a stylish look?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14237 0 0}Why, don't you see? You have to have an eye for glasses![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's the secret item I was thinking of surprising Aragaki-kun with the next time I saw him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}Surely, this would get that stoic face of his to break into laughter! Or, well, that was the plan...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14232 0 0}Why don't you take it? I'd be happy if you could put it to good use.[n]{f 1 1}
